aparyāpta a.
1 Not sufficient or enough, incomplete, insufficient.
2 Unlimited.
3 Unable (to do its
(pb) work), incompetent; aparyāptaṃ tadasmākaṃ balaṃ bhīṣmābhirakṣitaṃ  Bg. 1. 30.
